debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

failed_attempts:
by
  classical
  let e : lightToProfinite.obj S ≅ S.toProfinite := Iso.refl _
  simpa using (Injective.of_iso e)

by
  classical
  let e : S ≅ (Profinite.of (lightToProfinite.obj S)) := (lightToProfinite.objObjIso S).symm
  haveI : Injective (Profinite.of (lightToProfinite.obj S)) := by
    simpa using (injective_of_light S)
  exact (injective_iff_of_iso e).1 inferInstance

by
  classical
  let e : lightToProfinite.obj S ≅ S.toProfinite := Iso.refl _

by

    exact ⟨k, hk⟩⟩

  let g' : lightToProfinite.obj Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (⊤_ LightProfinite) :=

  let f' : lightToProfinite.obj S ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (⊤_ LightProfinite) :=
    (lightToProfinite.map (CompHausLike.isTerminalPUnit.from S))
  obtain ⟨k, _, hk⟩ :=
    Profinite.profinite_key_extension_lemma
      (X := lightToProfinite.obj X) (Y := lightToProfinite.obj Y)
      (S := lightToProfinite.obj S) (T := lightToProfinite.obj (⊤_ LightProfinite))
      (f := lightToProfinite.map f) (f' := f') (g := g) (g' := g')
      (by

            (g ≫ CompHausLike.isTerminalPUnit.from S)))

by
  classical
  letI : Injective S := inferInstance
  refine ⟨?factors⟩
  intro X Y g f hf
  have hf' : Mono (LightProfinite.toProfinite.map f) := by
    simpa using (show Mono (lightToProfinite.map f) from inferInstance)
  have : ∃ k : lightToProfinite.obj Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj S,
      lightToProfinite.map f ≫ k = g := by
    refine (Injective.factors (J := lightToProfinite) (X := X) (Y := Y) (I := S)
      (g := g) (f := f) ?_).elim ?_
    · intro k hk
      refine ⟨lightToProfinite.map k, ?_⟩
      simpa using congrArg (fun t => lightToProfinite.map t) hk
    · exact hf
  simpa using this

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_⟩

  haveI : Injective S := inferInstance

    (g := (lightToProfinite.homEquiv (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X) S).invFun g)
    (f := (lightToProfinite.homEquiv (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X)
      (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj Y)).invFun f) (by

  refine ⟨(lightToProfinite.homEquiv (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj Y) S).toFun k, ?_⟩
  apply (lightToProfinite.homEquiv (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X) S).injective
  simpa using congrArg
    (fun t =>
      (lightToProfinite.homEquiv (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X) S).invFun t) hk

by
  classical
  let I : Profinite.{u} := lightToProfinite.obj S
  haveI : Injective S := inferInstance
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  intro X Y g f hf
  let gL : (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X) ⟶ S := lightToProfinite.preimage g
  let fL : (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj X) ⟶ (Profinite.toLightProfinite.obj Y) :=
    lightToProfinite.preimage f
  have hfL : Mono fL := by
    have hf_inj :
        Function.Injective (f : (X : Type u) → (Y : Type u)) :=
      (CompHausLike.mono_iff_injective f).mp (show Mono f from hf)
    exact (CompHausLike.mono_iff_injective fL).2 hf_inj
  obtain ⟨kL, hkL⟩ := (Injective.factors (C := LightProfinite) (Z := S) gL fL (by infer_instance))
  refine ⟨lightToProfinite.map kL, ?_⟩
  apply ConcreteCategory.hom_ext
  exact congrArg (fun t => (lightToProfinite.map t : _)) hkL

by
  classical
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  intro X Y g f hf
  -- view everything in `LightProfinite`
  let X' : LightProfinite := lightToProfinite.leftObj X
  let Y' : LightProfinite := lightToProfinite.leftObj Y
  let S' : LightProfinite := S
  let f' : X' ⟶ Y' := lightToProfinite.leftMap f
  haveI : Mono f' := (lightToProfinite.mono_iff _).1 inferInstance
  let g' : X' ⟶ S' := lightToProfinite.leftMap g
  obtain ⟨k', hk'⟩ := (injective_of_light (S := S')).factors g' f' (by infer_instance)
  refine ⟨lightToProfinite.map k', ?_⟩
  -- show `f ≫ lightToProfinite.map k' = g`
  apply (Functor.map_injective lightToProfinite).1
  simpa using hk'

by
  classical
  let S' : Profinite := lightToProfinite.obj S
  have : Nonempty S' := (inferInstance : Nonempty S)
  letI : Injective (S : LightProfinite.{u}) := inferInstance
  refine
    ⟨fun {X Y} g f hfMono => ?_⟩
  classical
  let Xl : LightProfinite := LightProfinite.of (X : Type u)
  let Yl : LightProfinite := LightProfinite.of (Y : Type u)
  let gl : Xl ⟶ S := LightProfinite.ofHom g
  let fl : Xl ⟶ Yl := LightProfinite.ofHom f
  haveI : Mono fl := by
    dsimp [fl]
    infer_instance
  obtain ⟨kl, hkl⟩ := (Injective.factors gl fl)
  refine ⟨(lightToProfinite.map kl), ?_⟩
  ext x
  simpa using congrArg (fun h => (h : Xl ⟶ S)) hkl x

by
  classical
  letI : Injective S := LightProfinite.injective_of_light (S := S)
  refine

  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ :=
    (show ∃ kL : (lightToProfinite.obj Y ⟶ S), (lightToProfinite.map f) ≫ kL = g from by
      exact Injective.factors (X := lightToProfinite.obj X) (Y := lightToProfinite.obj Y) g
        (lightToProfinite.map f) hf)
  refine ⟨(lightToProfinite.preimage k), ?_⟩
  apply (lightToProfinite.map_injective S)
  simpa using hk

by
  classical
  let S' : Profinite.{u} := lightToProfinite.obj S
  haveI : Nonempty S' := (inferInstance : Nonempty S)
  haveI : Injective (S : LightProfinite.{u}) := inferInstance
  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · intro X Y g f hf
    have hf' : Mono (show lightToProfinite.obj X ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj Y from lightToProfinite.map f) :=
      (by infer_instance)
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ :=

  · intro X Y g f hf k₁ k₂ hk₁ hk₂
    apply (lightToProfinite.map_injective f) (a := k₁) (b := k₂)
    simpa using hk₁.trans hk₂.symm
